title: 2025-11-26 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 3.95
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-11-26: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 3.95/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-11-26, the score printed 3.95/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
